title: notifications-push — retention windows
description: Device tokens (RESTRICTED tier) purged aggressively — idle 90d → soft delete → 30d grace → hard purge. GDPR Art. 17 user erasure cascades to immediate hard delete.
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 5 (storage limitation) — device tokens are personal data
gdpr Art. 17 (right to erasure) — cascade on user delete

hot.description: Client refreshes last_seen_at on every app launch.

purge.action: soft delete (deleted_at = now, is_active=false) + fire PushSubscriptionExpired reason=idle_prune
immediate hard delete via cascade FK + write anonymised audit row

hot.description: Minor recipients have shorter retention regardless of activity.

purge.action: immediate hard delete + write anonymised audit
